subject: Three hooded elf soldiers walking forward together through a misty forest, armed with bows and a sword
description: Three hooded elven soldiers stride forward in formation through a foggy forest. The central figure walks slightly ahead with a determined expression, flanked by two companions. The figure on the right grips an unsheathed sword; longbows and quivers are visible across their shoulders. All three wear muted earth-toned cloaks and hoods, blending into the misty woodland behind them. Pale tree trunks rise vertically through soft green-grey haze, giving the scene a hushed, watchful atmosphere of patrol and pursuit. Lighting is diffuse and overcast, lending a cinematic, grounded fantasy mood rather than overt magic.
foreground: three hooded elf soldiers advancing with weapons drawn
background: misty forest with pale vertical tree trunks fading into fog
